testcase.name: Habit Management › should create a new habit
Habit Management › should mark habit as complete
Habit Management › should edit existing habit
Habit Management › should show analytics dashboard
Habit Management › should handle drag and drop reordering
Responsive Design › should work on mobile devices
Responsive Design › should work on tablet devices
Performance › should handle large number of habits
testcase.error:
[chromium] › habits.e2e.ts:171:7 › Performance › should handle large number of habits ────────────
TimeoutError: page.click: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('[data-testid="add-habit-button"]')
172 | // Create a substantial set of habits in dev mode 173 | for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) { > 174 | await page.click('[data-testid="add-habit-button"]'); | ^ 175 | await page.fill('[data-testid="habit-name-input"]', `Habit ${i}`); 176 | await submitHabitForm(page); 177 | } at D:\NEXT,js\habit-tracker\src\__tests__\e2e\habits.e2e.ts:174:18

testcase.name: Error Handling › should handle offline state gracefully
Error Handling › should handle invalid input
